# Consensus MCP Server

Get evidence-based answers from peer-reviewed research papers using Consensus's AI-powered academic search engine.

## Access

Freely accessible for basic queries. Premium features may require a **Consensus account**.

## Setup

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "consensus": {
      "type": "http",
      "url": "https://mcp.consensus.app/mcp"
    }
  }
}
```

## Capabilities

- Ask research questions and get synthesized answers from published papers
- Retrieve relevant studies with citation metadata
- Filter by study type, sample size, and publication date

## Source

Maintained by [Consensus](https://consensus.app/).
